creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
A standalone Macromedia Flash player. The Netscape plugin 
	which is compiled from the same source distribution will be 
	a seperate port due to a.out/ELF issue.

Fix: --Multipart_Sat_Oct__2_07:12:20_1999-1
Content-Type: application/octet-stream
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="flashplayer.uu"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
